description: Hand-picked seed texts for ULIP (unit-linked) pages

seeds.text: ULIP plans combine life insurance with market-linked investment. Choose from equity funds, debt funds, or balanced funds. Switch between funds, get tax benefits under Section 80C, and build long-term wealth alongside life cover. Unit linked insurance plan with NAV-based returns.

The Opportunity Fund is a high-growth equity fund within the ULIP portfolio. It invests in large-cap and mid-cap stocks aiming for capital appreciation over the long term. View latest NAV, fund performance, asset allocation, and benchmark comparison.

Combining insurance and investment through a unit-linked insurance plan offers market exposure, fund switching flexibility, and life cover in one product. Understand fund types, charges, lock-in period, and tax implications of ULIP investments.
